column1: # Static mass properties of each rigid body in the assembly.
# Body 0 is the stationary ground (not listed — infinite mass
#   x_com    : x-coordinate of the center of mass [mm]
#   y_com    : y-coordinate of the center of mass [mm]
#   Body 1 — diagonal bar leaning against Body 2.
#             Lower-left corner rests on the ground at (5
#             Upper-right corner presses against Body 2 at (60
#   Body 2 — vertical rectangular block standing on the ground.
#             Left face receives the push from Body 1 at (60
#             Bottom edge rests on the ground at x = 60 and x = 72.
